name: agent-equipment-config
description: Use Agent Equipment Config from Codex with routing guidance, MCP access, and a local-write guard hook.

interface.shortDescription: Route Agent Equipment Config work through Armory docs, MCP, and guards.
interface.longDescription: Agent Equipment Config helps Codex inspect effective Config layers, plan migrations, and apply reviewed local Config writes through the Armory runtime. The plugin bundles a routing skill, an AGENT_ARMORY_ROOT-based MCP launcher, and a PreToolUse guard for local-write MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the effective Agent Equipment Config for this repository.
Plan a reviewed Agent Equipment Config change before applying it.
